headlines.headline: Zelvon Biosciences reports rising costs pressuring margins in process automation

sentiment.reasoning: Rising costs directly impacting margins indicate a negative financial outlook for the company.

scoring.methodology: Gemini scores only the effect implied by the headline text itself, then separates immediate reaction versus later carry-through within the same 100-day session.
